hero.primary: Grooming, a trusted and gentle trade.
hero.secondary: {entreprise} is above all the story of a passionate dog groomer dedicated to animal welfare, rooted in the region, and determined to offer every pet the best care-to-price ratio.

histoire.secondary: Founded in September 2016 by {nom}, a dog groomer with over 10 years of experience, {entreprise} has grown alongside its appointments and the trust of pet owners. Today, the enterprise is recognized throughout Lot-et-Garonne for the quality of its care. We believe that good grooming is barely visible, but felt every day: comfort, silky coat, a soothed animal. That's the gentle excellence we offer every pet.

cartes.title: Well-being and gentleness
cartes.text: Attentive reading of body language and gentle handling for optimal stress management of your companion.

cartes.title: Coat expertise
cartes.text: Brushing, detangling, bath and drying adapted to coat type, clipping and scissor finishing strictly respecting breed standards.

cartes.title: Complete annex care
cartes.text: Nail trimming, ear cleaning, anal gland expression and early detection of potential skin problems.

cartes.title: Trust and proximity
cartes.text: A passionate groomer, based in Lot-et-Garonne, who treats every animal with the greatest respect and kindness.
